title: How to make an origami dog face step by step.
description:
Learn how to make an origami paper dog face step by step online.
[ Origami is the traditional Japanese art of paper folding ]

Things required to make a paper dog face :
1. One Square Paper (plain paper / one side colored / both side colored)
2. Marker / Sketch Pen

Also see,
How to make a ORIGAMI paper pig face step by step.
